final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing detailed exploded-view technical illustration of a Sony A7 camera showing all its components.

Style/medium: needs a technical exploded-view illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be an exploded/disassembled layout with all parts spread out and clearly separated, connected by alignment guides or lines
Subject: must include the Sony A7 camera fully disassembled into all its individual components with each part labeled by name
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include labeled part names for every component (e.g., sensor, shutter, lens mount, body shell, viewfinder, dials, buttons, battery compartment, card slot, PCB, mirror mechanism, etc.)
Constraints: must preserve accurate part layout consistent with the Sony A7 body structure; all labels must be legible and clearly associated with their respective parts
Avoid:
